meta.mode: AUDIT ONLY — no runtime code modified, no features, no refactor
meta.scope: Evidence-based readiness classification gathered via shell. Domains auth/healing/crisis/journal/provider/billing/dashboard/admin/chat untouched.

verdict.summary: Working tree clean, build green, verify:all 121 pass / 0 fail, all 10 public routes return 200. No deploy-blocking issues found. One non-blocking warning (analytics env var) noted.

gitStatus.note: Working tree clean; platform auto-checkpoints serve as commit mechanism for the main agent.

routesVerified.note: App is a client-only SPA (ReactDOM.createRoot, no real SSR); server returns 200 for SPA routes and the client router renders the view.

warnings.finding: VITE_GA_MEASUREMENT_ID is listed as a missing (not-yet-provided) secret.
warnings.impact: Google Analytics will be inert until the value is supplied. Does NOT block deploy; app functions normally without it.
warnings.action: Optional pre-launch: provide VITE_GA_MEASUREMENT_ID via the platform secrets manager if analytics is desired. Never hardcode it.

warnings.finding: SPA renders via createRoot (no SSR). SSR storage guards added in H2.8–H2.16 are defensive/additive only.
warnings.impact: No runtime impact; routes serve and render correctly. Noted for accuracy.

warnings.finding: client/dist is 36M (includes static media/brand assets, not just JS).
warnings.impact: Acceptable for deploy; CDN/static hosting handles assets. Not a blocker.
warnings.action: Optional future optimization pass (out of scope for this phase).

governanceStatus.primaryLaw: PASS — no business logic in healing flows; healing surfaces free of pricing/conversion/debugging.
governanceStatus.domainSeparation: PASS — no auth/healing/crisis/journal/provider/billing/dashboard/admin/chat runtime changes in this phase.
governanceStatus.executionDiscipline: PASS — evidence-first, verification-first, single-phase, no destructive ops.

remainingPreLaunchTasks.task: Provide VITE_GA_MEASUREMENT_ID secret if analytics is wanted (W1).
Confirm production deployment type (static/autoscale) and run health check against the deployed .replit.app domain post-publish.
Smoke-test crisis routing (988 / 741741 / 911 / /crisis) on the live deployed domain.
Future bundle-size optimization pass (W3), separately scoped.

steps: Each phase is auto-checkpointed by the platform; this audit added only docs (no runtime change) so rollback risk is nil.
If a future deploy regresses, roll back to the last green checkpoint (most recent commit id from <checkpoint_created>).
Re-run gate trio to confirm recovery: npm run verify:all -> npm run build -> route checks (/ /blog /about /features /pricing /healing /journal /chat /tools /crisis all 200).
Never use destructive git to revert; use platform rollback. Never db:push --force without explicit approval.
rollbackPlan.lastKnownGreen: verify:all 121 pass / 0 fail; build ✓ 50.68s; 10/10 routes 200; git clean (this phase).
